description:
Acharya Shantideva’s A Guide to the Bodhisattva’s Way of Life

Delve into Shantideva’s masterpiece on the bodhisattva path, inspiring ethical living, patience, and bodhicitta.This online teaching illuminates the way to selfless service and ultimate enlightenment for all beings.

Zoom: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/89800597231?pwd=SBVXzqD61bJIWXoTdW5oT6tbVUbJSx.1

location.address: No. 24, 1st floor, 3rd Main Rd, K.R.Colony, Domlur I Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560071
location.name: Choe Khor Sum Ling Centre, Ashwini

name: A Guide to the Bodhisattava's Way of Life (Hybrid)

description:
NEW Introductory Course – MEDITATION 101 (in 5 sessions)Starting Monday, 20 April 2026, 6.30 – 8.00 pm (Hybrid at CKSL)

Course Facilitator - Ratnakar Gokhale and Archana Bharatee

This new five-session introductory course offers foundational training in meditation techniques and principles. Perfect for newcomers, it combines theory and practice in a supportive hybrid environment at CKSL.

Register in advance for this meeting:
https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/91DKGRYIRQuaYR4B2wgo_g
